name: org-member-inverse-declared
query: PREFIX org: <http://www.w3.org/ns/org#> ASK WHERE { org:memberOf <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#inverseOf> org:hasMember }

name: org-member-domain-range-declared
query: PREFIX org: <http://www.w3.org/ns/org#> PREFIX foaf: <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/> ASK WHERE { org:memberOf <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#domain> foaf:Agent ; <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#range> org:Organization }
